meaning: adj.<美俚> 风行一时的,非常流行的n.卖座的好戏,开心的大笑
examples: Two days later, Mr Boffo resigned.
For years he was a boffo box office certainty.
EXAMPLE: My favorite actor appears in a boffo new film everybody's talking about.
And that usually gives one even greater comfort that the initial offering will be boffo.
But as any movie fan knows, critical raves do not always equal boffo box office.
